title: OpenAMP Lab Result
description: Machine-readable lab assay result for a computational candidate. Required for active-learning loop ingestion.

result_id.description: Unique identifier for this assay result (e.g. UUID)

candidate_id.description: ID from the evidence certificate of the tested candidate

panel_id.description: Identifier of the frozen candidate panel or batch, when supplied

organism_or_cell_line.description: Organism tested (e.g. 'E. coli ATCC 25922') or cell line (e.g. 'hRBC') with strain/lot details

result_value.description: Numeric result (e.g. MIC in µg/mL, or % hemolysis). Null if qualitative only.

positive_control_passed.description: Whether the positive control gave the expected result

negative_control_passed.description: Whether the negative control gave the expected result

positive_control_id.description: Identity of the positive control used (e.g. 'ciprofloxacin 0.25 µg/mL')

negative_control_id.description: Identity of the negative control used (e.g. 'PBS', 'vehicle')

performed_by_lab.description: Name of lab or CRO that performed the assay (not individual researchers)

raw_data_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the raw assay data file, if available

computational_candidate_certificate_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the evidence certificate JSON for this candidate at time of selection

notes.description: Optional assay notes, deviations from protocol, or caveats

disclaimer.description: Must state that this is an experimental result on a computationally nominated candidate and does not constitute a drug or clinical claim
